hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.json ]] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'Remember: Use /validate-content after creating lessons or MCQs. Use /run-medical-tests before committing.'
